testcase.name: DbxInputFormControlComponent > should be created
DbxForgeFormComponent > validation gating (requireValid = true) > should not emit getValue() when a required field is empty
DbxForgeFormComponent > validation gating (requireValid = true) > should emit getValue() when a required field has a value
DbxForgeFormComponent > validation gating (requireValid = true) > should emit getValue() for optional fields even when empty
DbxForgeFormComponent > validation gating (requireValid = true) > should report isComplete=false in stream$ when required field is empty
DbxForgeFormComponent > validation gating (requireValid = true) > should report isComplete=true in stream$ when required field has a value
DbxForgeFormComponent > requireValid = false > should emit getValue() even when a required field is empty
DbxForgeFormComponent > requireValid = false > should still report isComplete=false in stream$ when invalid
DbxForgeFormComponent > stripInternalKeys (default true) > should strip _ prefixed keys from toggle wrapper output
DbxForgeFormComponent > stripInternalKeys (default true) > should preserve domain model keys from inside wrappers
DbxForgeFormComponent > stripInternalKeys = false > should preserve _ prefixed keys in output
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should strip primitive _ keys
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should unwrap object _ keys (sections)
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should handle mixed toggle + section output
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should handle nested sections
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should preserve non-underscore keys
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should preserve arrays
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should return null/undefined as-is
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should return primitives as-is
stripForgeInternalKeys() > should recursively clean non-underscore object values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should strip empty string values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should strip null values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should strip undefined values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should preserve false values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should preserve zero values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should preserve empty arrays
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should preserve non-empty arrays
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should recursively strip nested empty values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should keep nested objects with non-empty values
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should handle deeply nested objects
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should return null/undefined as-is
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should return primitives as-is
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should return empty object when all values are empty
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should work with combined stripForgeInternalKeys output
stripEmptyForgeValues() > should preserve values from combined strip when non-empty
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should return a result with field, asyncValidators, and validationMessages
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should create an input field with correct key and label
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should add async validator reference to the field
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should register the async validator with the default name
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should use the default error message in validationMessages
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should use custom error message when provided
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should support custom validator name
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should pass through text field config options
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > should have params, factory, onSuccess, and onError on the async validator
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > onSuccess should return null for available values
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > onSuccess should return validation error for unavailable values
forgeTextIsAvailableField() > onError should return null (not block form on errors)
forgeTextPasswordField() > should create an input field
forgeTextPasswordField() > should default key to password
forgeTextPasswordField() > should default label to Password
forgeTextPasswordField() > should use password input type
forgeTextPasswordField() > should be required by default
forgeTextPasswordField() > should allow overriding the key
forgeTextPasswordField() > should allow overriding the label
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should create an input field
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should default key to verifyPassword
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should default label to Verify Password
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should use password input type
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should be required by default
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should allow overriding the key
forgeTextVerifyPasswordField() > should allow overriding the label
forgeUsernameLoginField() > should create an email input field when configured with email string
forgeUsernameLoginField() > should create a text input field when configured with username string
forgeUsernameLoginField() > should set required when using email shorthand
forgeUsernameLoginField() > should set required when using username shorthand
forgeUsernameLoginField() > should use email config when provided as object
forgeUsernameLoginField() > should use username config when provided as object
forgeUsernamePasswordLoginFields() > should return an array of two fields
forgeUsernamePasswordLoginFields() > should have the username field first and password field second
forgeUsernamePasswordLoginFields() > should create email-based username when configured with email
forgeUsernamePasswordLoginFields() > should create text-based username when configured with username
forgeUsernamePasswordLoginFields() > should create a password field with password input type
forgeUsernamePasswordLoginFields() > should propagate password config
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should create a searchable text field with type dbx-searchable-text
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should default to key "timezone"
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should default to label "Timezone"
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should allow overriding key
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should allow overriding label
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should set required when specified
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should configure search and display props
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should work with no arguments
forgeTimezoneStringField() > should work with empty config
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should create an input field
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should default key to website
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should default label to Website Url
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should use text input type
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should allow overriding the key
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should allow overriding the label
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should set required when specified
forgeWebsiteUrlField() > should map description to hint in props
FormActionDirective > should be created
FormActionDirective > when form valid > should provide the value when triggered.
FormActionDirective > when form is invalid > isModifiedAndCanTrigger$ should be false.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > should complete when the state stream and mode and value obs completes.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > reset > should not pipe values when the state is INITIALIZING.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > reset > should not pipe values when the state is INITIALIZING.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > reset > should only pipe the first value when the state is RESET and ignore subsequent source changes.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > reset > should only pipe values while the state is RESET.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > reset > should pipe the first value recieved when reset occurs
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > reset > should forward the latest value on each RESET after USED
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > always > should not pipe values when the state is INITIALIZING.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > always > should not pipe values when the state is changing between other non-initialized states.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > always > should pipe values when the state is RESET.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > always > should pipe values when the state is USED.
dbxFormSourceObservableFromStream() > mode > always > should continue to pipe values while the state is not INITIALIZING.
DbxFormLoadingPairSourceDirective > should be created
DbxFormLoadingPairSourceDirective > should pass the value of the observable to the form
forgeChecklistField() > should create a multi-checkbox field with correct type
forgeChecklistField() > should set options on the field
forgeChecklistField() > should set required when specified
forgeChecklistField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeChecklistField() > should default value to empty array
forgeChecklistField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeChecklistField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeChecklistField() > should set labelPosition in props
forgeChecklistField() > should not include props when no description or labelPosition is set
forgeChecklistField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeChecklistField() > should work with numeric option values
forgeComponentField rendering > should load component A on initial render
forgeComponentField rendering > should load component B on initial render
forgeComponentField rendering > should produce unique keys per invocation so ng-forge treats config changes as new fields
forgeComponentField rendering > config change via fresh fixture > should load B when fixture starts with B config
forgeComponentField rendering > config change via fresh fixture > should load A then B across separate fixtures
forgeComponentField() > should create a field with type dbx-component
forgeComponentField() > should generate a unique key when not specified
forgeComponentField() > should use provided key
forgeComponentField() > should set label when specified
forgeComponentField() > should default label to empty string when not specified
forgeComponentField() > should pass componentField through in props
forgeComponentField() > should pass providers through in componentField props
forgeComponentField() > should pass different component classes
forgeTextEditorField() > should create a field with the correct type
forgeTextEditorField() > should set the key from config
forgeTextEditorField() > should set label when provided
forgeTextEditorField() > should default label to empty string when not provided
forgeTextEditorField() > should default value to empty string
forgeTextEditorField() > should set required when specified
forgeTextEditorField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeTextEditorField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeTextEditorField() > should pass minLength through props
forgeTextEditorField() > should pass maxLength through props
forgeTextEditorField() > should set minLength on the field
forgeTextEditorField() > should set maxLength on the field
forgeValueSelectionField() > should create a select field with correct type
forgeValueSelectionField() > should set options on the field
forgeValueSelectionField() > should set required when specified
forgeValueSelectionField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeValueSelectionField() > should set multiple flag in props
forgeValueSelectionField() > should not include multiple in props when not specified
forgeValueSelectionField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeValueSelectionField() > should not include props when no description or multiple is set
forgeValueSelectionField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeValueSelectionField() > should not include value when defaultValue is not provided
forgeValueSelectionField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeValueSelectionField() > should work with numeric option values
forgeRow() > should create a row field with correct type
forgeRow() > should set an auto-generated key
forgeRow() > should use a custom key when provided
forgeRow() > should include the provided fields
forgeRow() > should set className when provided
forgeRow() > should not set className when not provided
flexSizeToCol() > should map size 1 to col 2
flexSizeToCol() > should map size 2 to col 4
flexSizeToCol() > should map size 3 to col 6
flexSizeToCol() > should map size 6 to col 12
flexSizeToCol() > should clamp to max col 12
flexSizeToCol() > should clamp to min col 1
forgeFlexRow() > should create a row field with correct type
forgeFlexRow() > should apply default size 2 (col 4) to plain field defs
forgeFlexRow() > should apply explicit size from field config
forgeFlexRow() > should apply custom defaultSize
forgeFlexRow() > should set dbx-flex-group className by default
forgeFlexRow() > should use custom className when provided
forgeFlexRow() > should handle mixed plain fields and field configs
forgeSectionGroup() > should create a group field with correct type
forgeSectionGroup() > should default key to _section_ prefix when not specified
forgeSectionGroup() > should use provided key
forgeSectionGroup() > should include the provided fields
forgeSectionGroup() > should set className when provided
forgeSectionGroup() > should not set className when not provided
forgeSectionGroup() > should prepend a section header field when header is provided
forgeSectionGroup() > should not prepend header when header is not provided
forgeSectionGroup() > should default section header to h3
forgeSectionGroup() > should pass hint and icon to the section header
forgeSectionGroup() > should set logic when provided
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should create a group field with correct type
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should default key to _subsection_ prefix when not specified
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should use provided key
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should include the provided fields
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should set className when provided
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should not set className when not provided
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should prepend a subsection header field when header is provided
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should default subsection header to h4
forgeSubsectionGroup() > should set logic when provided
forgeSectionHeaderField() > should create a field with the correct type
forgeSectionHeaderField() > should auto-generate a key
forgeSectionHeaderField() > should use a custom key when provided
forgeSectionHeaderField() > should pass header config through props
forgeWithClassName() > should return a copy of the field with className set
forgeWithClassName() > should not mutate the original field
forgeStyledGroup() > should create a group with the provided className
forgeStyledGroup() > should include the provided fields
forgeStyledGroup() > should use provided key
forgeToggleWrapper() > should create a row field
forgeToggleWrapper() > should contain a toggle field and a content group
forgeToggleWrapper() > should auto-generate a toggle key with _toggle_ prefix
forgeToggleWrapper() > should use a custom toggle key when provided
forgeToggleWrapper() > should set toggle label
forgeToggleWrapper() > should default toggle value to false
forgeToggleWrapper() > should set toggle value to true when defaultOpen is true
forgeToggleWrapper() > should set hidden logic on the content group
forgeToggleWrapper() > should set className on the outer row
forgeToggleWrapper() > should use default className when not provided
forgeExpandField() > should create a field with the correct type
forgeExpandField() > should use the provided key
forgeExpandField() > should default value to false
forgeExpandField() > should set value to true when defaultOpen is true
forgeExpandField() > should default buttonType to text
forgeExpandField() > should use custom buttonType
forgeExpandField() > should set expandLabel from label
forgeExpandWrapper() > should create a row field
forgeExpandWrapper() > should contain an expand field and a content group
forgeExpandWrapper() > should auto-generate an expand key with _expand_ prefix
forgeExpandWrapper() > should use a custom expand key when provided
forgeExpandWrapper() > should set hidden logic on the content group
forgeExpandWrapper() > should pass buttonType to expand field
forgeExpandWrapper() > should use default className when not provided
forgeExpandWrapper() > should use custom className when provided
forgeInfoButtonField() > should create a field with the correct type
forgeInfoButtonField() > should auto-generate a key
forgeInfoButtonField() > should pass onInfoClick through props
forgeInfoButtonField() > should pass ariaLabel through props
forgeInfoWrapper() > should create a row field
forgeInfoWrapper() > should contain the field and an info button
forgeInfoWrapper() > should use custom col values
forgeWorkingField() > should create a field with the correct type
forgeWorkingField() > should auto-generate a key
forgeWorkingField() > should pass watchFieldKey through props
forgeWorkingWrapper() > should create a group field
forgeWorkingWrapper() > should contain the original field and a working indicator

forgeAutoTouchField() > should auto-generate a key
forgeAutoTouchField() > should set hidden to true
forgeAutoTouchField() > should pass watchFieldKey through props
forgeAutoTouchWrapper() > should create a row field
forgeAutoTouchWrapper() > should contain the original field and an autotouch field

forgeListSelectionField() > should set the key
forgeListSelectionField() > should set the label when provided

forgeListSelectionField() > should set required when provided
forgeListSelectionField() > should not set required when not provided
forgeListSelectionField() > should set readonly when provided
forgeListSelectionField() > should map description to props.hint
forgeListSelectionField() > should not set hint when description is not provided

forgeListSelectionField() > should propagate readKey through props
forgeListSelectionField() > should propagate state$ through props

forgeListSelectionField() > should not set loadMore when not provided

forgeSearchableStringChipField() > should set the key

forgeSearchableStringChipField() > should always set allowStringValues to true

forgeSearchableStringChipField() > should propagate search through props

forgeSourceSelectField() > should set the key
forgeSourceSelectField() > should set the label when provided

forgeSourceSelectField() > should set required when provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should not set required when not provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should set readonly when provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should map description to props.hint
forgeSourceSelectField() > should not set hint when description is not provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should propagate valueReader through props
forgeSourceSelectField() > should propagate metaLoader through props
forgeSourceSelectField() > should propagate displayForValue through props
forgeSourceSelectField() > should propagate multiple through props when provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should not set multiple when not provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should propagate filterable through props when provided
forgeSourceSelectField() > should propagate openSource through props when provided
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > addItem() > should add an item with empty value
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > addItem() > should sync to field tree after adding
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > addItem() > should add multiple items with unique trackIds
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > removeItem() > should remove item at the given index
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > removeItem() > should sync to field tree after removing
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > duplicateItem() > should insert duplicate after the source by default
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > duplicateItem() > should add duplicate to end when addDuplicateToEnd is true
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > duplicateItem() > should do nothing for invalid index
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > drop() > should reorder items when dropped at a new position
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > drop() > should sync to field tree after drop
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > drop() > should handle drop to same position
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > drop() > should move last item to first position
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > onItemValueChange() > should update the item value at the given index
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > onItemValueChange() > should preserve trackId when updating value
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > onItemValueChange() > should not change items for invalid index
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > labelForItem() > should return index-only label when no labelForField
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > labelForItem() > should use static string labelForField
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > labelForItem() > should use function labelForField
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > showAddButtonSignal > should be true by default
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > showAddButtonSignal > should be false when allowAdd is false
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > showAddButtonSignal > should be false when maxLength is reached
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > showAddButtonSignal > should be true when under maxLength
ForgeArrayFieldComponent > initialization from field values > should initialize items from field tree initial values
forgeArrayField() > should create a field with the correct type
forgeArrayField() > should use the provided key
forgeArrayField() > should default value to empty array
forgeArrayField() > should use provided initial values
forgeArrayField() > should pass template through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass single-field template
forgeArrayField() > should pass addText through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass removeText through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass disableRearrange through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass maxLength through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass allowDuplicate through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass labelForField string through props
forgeArrayField() > should pass labelForField function through props
forgeArrayField() > should not include undefined optional props
forgeToggleField() > should create a toggle field with correct type
forgeToggleField() > should default value to false
forgeToggleField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeToggleField() > should set required when specified
forgeToggleField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeToggleField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeToggleField() > should set description as hint in props
forgeToggleField() > should apply styled box className by default
forgeToggleField() > should not apply styled box className when styledBox is false
forgeCheckboxField() > should create a checkbox field with correct type
forgeCheckboxField() > should default value to false
forgeCheckboxField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeCheckboxField() > should set required when specified
forgeCheckboxField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeCheckboxField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeCheckboxField() > should set description as hint in props
forgeCheckboxField() > should apply styled box className by default
forgeCheckboxField() > should not apply styled box className when styledBox is false

forgeTimeDurationField() > should set the key from config
forgeTimeDurationField() > should set label when provided
forgeTimeDurationField() > should default label to empty string when not provided
forgeTimeDurationField() > should set required when specified
forgeTimeDurationField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeTimeDurationField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeTimeDurationField() > should pass outputUnit through props
forgeTimeDurationField() > should pass valueMode through props
forgeTimeDurationField() > should pass allowedUnits through props
forgeTimeDurationField() > should pass min and max through props
forgeTimeDurationField() > should pass carryOver through props
forgeTimeDurationField() > should not include props when no extra config is provided
forgeHiddenField() > should create a hidden input field
forgeHiddenField() > should set empty label
forgeHiddenField() > should default value to empty string
forgeHiddenField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeHiddenField() > should accept non-string defaultValue
forgeHiddenField() > should set required when specified
forgeHiddenField() > should not include required when not specified
forgeNumberField() > should create an input field with number type in props
forgeNumberField() > should set required when specified
forgeNumberField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeNumberField() > should set min and max on the field
forgeNumberField() > should set min, max, and step in props
forgeNumberField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeNumberField() > should set placeholder in props
forgeNumberField() > should have no default value when none is specified
forgeNumberField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeNumberField() > should allow defaultValue of 0
forgeNumberField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeNumberSliderField() > should create a slider field with dbx-slider type
forgeNumberSliderField() > should set min, max, and step in props
forgeNumberSliderField() > should default thumbLabel to true
forgeNumberSliderField() > should allow disabling thumbLabel
forgeNumberSliderField() > should derive tickInterval from step when step is provided
forgeNumberSliderField() > should use explicit tickInterval when provided
forgeNumberSliderField() > should disable ticks when tickInterval is false
forgeNumberSliderField() > should set required when specified
forgeNumberSliderField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeNumberSliderField() > should have no default value when none is specified
forgeNumberSliderField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeNumberSliderField() > should allow defaultValue of 0
forgeNumberSliderField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeNumberSliderField() > should set description as hint in props
forgeDollarAmountField() > should create a number input field
forgeDollarAmountField() > should set min when specified
forgeDollarAmountField() > should set required when specified
forgeDollarAmountField() > should have no default value when none is specified
forgeDollarAmountField() > should use defaultValue when provided
forgeDollarAmountField() > should set the key from config
forgeDollarAmountField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeDollarAmountField() > should set precision to DOLLAR_AMOUNT_PRECISION via transform
forgeDollarAmountField() > should set label when provided
forgeDollarAmountField() > should default label to empty string when not provided
dateTimeFieldCalc() > should return an object implementing DateTimeFieldCalc
buildCombinedDateTime() > should return undefined when isCleared is true
buildCombinedDateTime() > should return undefined when isCleared is true even with date and time
buildCombinedDateTime() > fullDay mode > should return startOfDay when fullDay and not UTC
buildCombinedDateTime() > fullDay mode > should return utcDayForDate when fullDay and fullDayInUTC
buildCombinedDateTime() > with time string > should combine date and time string
buildCombinedDateTime() > with time string > should combine date and 24-hour time string
buildCombinedDateTime() > time-only mode > should use timeDate when no dateValue and isTimeOnly
buildCombinedDateTime() > time-only mode > should fall back to current date when isTimeOnly and no timeDate
buildCombinedDateTime() > no time string > should return undefined when time is required and no time string
buildCombinedDateTime() > no time string > should return date as-is when time is optional and no time string
buildCombinedDateTime() > no time string > should return date as-is when time is none and no time string
buildCombinedDateTime() > no date > should return undefined when no dateValue and not timeOnly
applyTimeOffset() > should add minutes when offset is positive
applyTimeOffset() > should subtract minutes when offset is negative
applyTimeOffset() > should multiply offset by minuteStep
applyTimeOffset() > should return clamped date when offset is 0
applyTimeOffset() > should clamp to min limit from config
mergePickerConfig() > should return config unchanged when no sync values
mergePickerConfig() > should return config unchanged when both sync values are null
mergePickerConfig() > should add min from syncBeforeValue
mergePickerConfig() > should add max from syncAfterValue
mergePickerConfig() > should add both min and max from sync values
mergePickerConfig() > should merge sync values with existing limits
mergePickerConfig() > should return undefined-safe result when config is undefined
filterPresets() > should return empty array when fullDay is true
filterPresets() > should return all presets when timeOnly is true
filterPresets() > should return empty array when no selectedDate and not timeOnly
filterPresets() > should return all presets when selectedDate provided and no config limits
computeErrorMessage() > should return undefined for null errors
computeErrorMessage() > should return undefined for empty errors
computeErrorMessage() > should return required message when required error present and isRequired
computeErrorMessage() > should not return required message when not isRequired
computeErrorMessage() > should return schedule error message
computeErrorMessage() > should return time range error message
computeErrorMessage() > should return pattern error message
computeErrorMessage() > should return generic error for unknown error keys
computeDateKeyboardStep() > should return null for non-arrow keys
computeDateKeyboardStep() > should return direction=1 for ArrowUp
computeDateKeyboardStep() > should return direction=-1 for ArrowDown
computeDateKeyboardStep() > should return offset=30 with Ctrl
computeDateKeyboardStep() > should return offset=7 with Shift
computeDateKeyboardStep() > should return offset=365 with Ctrl+Shift
computeTimeKeyboardStep() > should return null for non-arrow keys
computeTimeKeyboardStep() > should return direction=1, offset=1 for ArrowUp
computeTimeKeyboardStep() > should return direction=-1, offset=1 for ArrowDown
computeTimeKeyboardStep() > should return offset=60 with Alt
computeTimeKeyboardStep() > should return offset=5 with Shift
computeTimeKeyboardStep() > should return offset=300 with Alt+Shift
navigateDate() > should navigate forward by 1 day
navigateDate() > should navigate backward by 1 day
navigateDate() > should navigate forward by 7 days
navigateDate() > should navigate backward by 30 days
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should not re-emit after initial value set (date+time mode)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should not re-emit after initial value set (time-only mode)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should not re-emit after initial value set (unix timestamp mode)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should not re-emit after initial value set (minute of day mode)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should stabilize after programmatic time control change
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should stabilize after programmatic date control change
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should not strobe when timezone changes
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should not strobe when pickerConfig changes
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > value stability > should re-trigger output when timezone changes
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date picker (day only) > should not show time input
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date picker (day only) > should accept and output a Date value
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > day only with string value > should not show calendar picker button when hideDatePicker is true
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > day only with string value > should configure DAY_STRING value mode
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > default date+time (required) > should show both date and time inputs
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > default date+time (required) > should sync date control from form value
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > default date+time (required) > should configure required field
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date with string value > should configure DATE_STRING value mode
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date with string value > should hide date hint
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time for work day today > should hide date input when restricted to single day
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > optional time mode > should have OPTIONAL time mode
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > optional time mode > should show time input after addTime()
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > optional time mode > should hide time input after removeTime()
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > day only > should not show time input and fullDay should be true
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time only > should not show date input
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time only > should apply preset when selected
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time for today (restricted) > should not show clear button
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > unix timestamp > should accept number input and output number
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > unix timestamp in New York > should apply timezone
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date only in Tokyo > should use Asia/Tokyo timezone
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time only in New York > should use America/New_York timezone
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > minute of day > should configure as MINUTE_OF_DAY time-only
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > minute of day > should output a number
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > minute of day for New York > should show timezone and use America/New_York
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > system minute of day > should use SYSTEM_MINUTE_OF_DAY value mode
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > timezone day (DATE_STRING with observable timezone) > should configure DATE_STRING with observable timezone
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > timezone day (DATE_STRING with observable timezone) > should recompute when timezone changes
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date with schedule > should respect picker config with schedule
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > date with schedule > should produce output when date and time are set with schedule config
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > changing configuration > should handle dynamic pickerConfig updates
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > core actions > clearValue() should reset both controls and output undefined
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > core actions > setTime() should update the time control
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > core actions > setTime() should not update when value is the same
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > core actions > addTime() and removeTime() should toggle fullDay state
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time input behavior > should not clear time control while user is focused (with date)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time input behavior > should not clear time control while user is focused on time input (without date set)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time input behavior > should track focus state via onTimeFocus/onTimeBlur
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > time input behavior > should stabilize after setTime with date set
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > presets menu > should have presets available even without a date set (falls back to today)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > presets menu > should have presets available for time-only field with explicit presets
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > presets menu > should have presets when no date is set (time-date field)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > presets menu > should auto-fill date with today when time is entered without a date
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > presets menu > should have no presets when fullDay is true
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should increment time on ArrowUp (default 5 min step)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should decrement time on ArrowDown (default 5 min step)
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should use 5x offset with Shift modifier
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should use 60x offset with Alt modifier
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should use 300x offset with Alt+Shift modifier
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should ignore non-arrow keys
ForgeDateTimeFieldComponent > arrow key time navigation > should respect custom minuteStep

forgeDateField() > should set required when specified
forgeDateField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeDateField() > should set minDate when specified
forgeDateField() > should set maxDate when specified
forgeDateField() > should accept string minDate and maxDate
forgeDateField() > should set startAt when specified
forgeDateField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeDateField() > should not include props when no description is provided
forgeDateField() > should provide empty label when not specified
forgeDateTimeField() > should create a datetime field with correct type
forgeDateTimeField() > should set required when specified
forgeDateTimeField() > should set readonly when specified
forgeDateTimeField() > should map description to hint in props
forgeDateTimeField() > should set timeMode in props

forgeDateTimeField() > should set custom labels in props
forgeDateTimeField() > should set pickerConfig in props
forgeDateTimeField() > should set fullDayFieldName in props
forgeDateTimeField() > should set getSyncFieldsObs in props

forgeDateTimeField() > should not override explicit timeMode with showTime
forgeDateTimeField() > should set minuteStep in props
forgeDateTimeField() > should set autofillDateWhenTimeIsPicked in props
forgeDateTimeField() > should provide empty label when not specified

forgePhoneField() > should set enableSearch in props

forgePhoneAndLabelSectionField() > should contain one child field which is a row
forgePhoneAndLabelSectionField() > should propagate phoneField config to the inner row
forgePhoneAndLabelSectionField() > should propagate labelField config to the inner row

forgePhoneListField() > should default key to phones

forgePhoneListField() > should default removeText to Remove Phone Number

forgePhoneListField() > should use custom removeText
forgePhoneListField() > should set minLength when provided
forgePhoneListField() > should set maxLength when provided
